## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Type hints added for new public functions
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
